properties.label: Called Process ID
properties.description: ID of the process to be called by this call activity

properties.label: Source variable for sendEmailRequest
properties.value: =fromAi(toolCall.sendEmailRequest, "This is a boolean value set to true if you would like email a customer requesting the document and false if you already have the document and just need it processed", "boolean")

properties.label: Source variable for emailBody
properties.value: =fromAi(toolCall.emailRequestBody, "This is the body of the email that will be sent to request a document. Must be formatted in plain text, if you don't need to request a document it is null", "string")

properties.label:
Target variable for ={
  "nameOnDocument" : nameOnID,
  "DocumentType" : idType,
  "DocumentexpiryDate" : expiryDate,
  "DocumentNumber" : idNumber,
  "SystemInformation" : systemNote
}
